key.name: temp-warn
key.description: Panel indicator turns orange above this temperature.

key.name: temp-crit
key.description: Panel indicator turns red; throttling imminent or active.

key.name: poll-interval
key.description: How often to read thermal sensors and throttle counters.

key.name: hide-when-nominal
key.summary: Hide the indicator when nothing is throttling
key.description: When enabled, the panel indicator is hidden while all components are nominal, and reappears on a warning or confirmed throttle event.

key.name: notify-on-throttle
key.summary: Send a notification on confirmed throttling
key.description: When enabled, a desktop notification is shown when a confirmed thermal throttle event begins.
